div.h1: Layer Normalization Positioning in Transformer Blocks

p.em: Technical Specification for Gradient Flow & Numerical Stability

g.title: The identity branch is a clean gradient highway.
The identity branch is modified by LayerNorm before the next layer.

text.tspan: 2. Initialization: Safe to use large learning rates immediately.
3. Scalability: Enables training of 100B+ parameter models.
1. Gradient Scale: Norm at end causes vanishing/exploding gradients.
2. Warmup: Requires careful LR scheduling to prevent divergence.
3. Depth: Difficult to converge beyond 24-48 layers without tricks.

g.title: The identity branch is a clean gradient highway.
The identity branch is modified by LayerNorm before the next layer.
